requirement_topic.zh: SUBTEL无线电/电信均质化（型式认可）
requirement_topic.zht: SUBTEL無線電/電信均質化（型式認可）

summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment (including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, IoT, and cellular devices) must obtain SUBTEL homologación (type approval certificate) before import or sale in Chile, under Ley de Telecomunicaciones No. 18.168. The SUBTEL-assigned TS (Tipo y Subtipo) number must appear on the product label. FCC, CE, SRRC, and CCC approvals are not recognised by SUBTEL; a separate Chilean certification is mandatory. Application is via SUBTEL's online portal; a local Chilean representative may be required.
summary.zh: 依据电信法No.18.168，所有无线电及电信终端设备（包括Wi-Fi、蓝牙、物联网和蜂窝设备）在进口或于智利销售前须取得SUBTEL均质化（型式认可证书）。SUBTEL分配的TS（Tipo y Subtipo）编号须标注在产品标签上。FCC、CE、SRRC和CCC核准不被SUBTEL承认；须另行取得智利认证。通过SUBTEL在线门户申请；可能需要智利本地代表。
summary.zht: 依據電信法No.18.168，所有無線電及電信終端裝置（包括Wi-Fi、藍牙、物聯網和蜂窩裝置）在進口或於智利銷售前須取得SUBTEL均質化（型式認可證書）。SUBTEL分配的TS（Tipo y Subtipo）編號須標注在產品標籤上。FCC、CE、SRRC和CCC核准不被SUBTEL承認；須另行取得智利認證。通過SUBTEL線上門戶申請；可能需要智利本地代表。

standards_or_laws: SUBTEL Decreto Supremo No. 127 (Reglamento de Homologación)
SUBTEL resolutions on technical requirements for radio equipment

summary.en: China requires MIIT/SRRC radio type approval for intentional radiators (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular) and a MIIT Network Access License (NAL) for telecom terminal equipment. These cover radio compliance and network access but are not transferable to Chile — SUBTEL conducts an independent evaluation and issues its own certificate.
summary.zh: 中国对有意辐射体（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝）要求MIIT/SRRC无线电型式核准，对电信终端设备要求MIIT入网许可证（NAL）。这些覆盖无线电合规和网络接入，但不可移转至智利——SUBTEL进行独立评估并颁发其自身证书。
summary.zht: 中國對有意輻射體（Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩）要求MIIT/SRRC無線電型式核准，對電信終端裝置要求MIIT入網許可證（NAL）。這些涵蓋無線電合規和網路接入，但不可移轉至智利——SUBTEL進行獨立評估並頒發其自身證書。

standards_or_laws: MIIT Network Access License (NAL / 进网许可证) — China
Radio Regulations of the People's Republic of China

gap.en: SUBTEL does not recognise SRRC, MIIT NAL, FCC, or CE approvals. A separate SUBTEL homologation application is required, with Chilean-specific test reports and documentation in Spanish. The TS number must appear on the Chilean product label. A Chilean local representative may be required for the application.
gap.zh: SUBTEL不承认SRRC、MIIT NAL、FCC或CE核准。须另行提交SUBTEL均质化申请，附智利特定测试报告及西班牙语文件。TS编号须标注在智利产品标签上。申请可能需要智利本地代表。
gap.zht: SUBTEL不承認SRRC、MIIT NAL、FCC或CE核准。須另行提交SUBTEL均質化申請，附智利特定測試報告及西班牙語文件。TS編號須標注在智利產品標籤上。申請可能需要智利本地代表。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SUBTEL homologación is mandatory for all wireless and telecom terminal equipment sold or imported into Chile. China SRRC and MIIT NAL approvals have no equivalence with SUBTEL; a separate Chilean certification process is required. A TS number on the product label is legally required before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在智利销售或进口的所有无线及电信终端设备必须取得SUBTEL均质化认证。中国SRRC和MIIT NAL核准与SUBTEL无对等关系；须另行开展智利认证流程。产品标签须在市场准入前标注TS编号，此为法律要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在智利銷售或進口的所有無線及電信終端裝置必須取得SUBTEL均質化認證。中國SRRC和MIIT NAL核准與SUBTEL無對等關係；須另行開展智利認證流程。產品標籤須在市場准入前標注TS編號，此為法律要求。
